details.test: Task 1: Pay upcoming rent with cheapest payment method
Task 2: Set up recurring rent autopay (full statement 5 days before due)
Task 3: Submit non-urgent maintenance request for leaky kitchen faucet
Task 4: Reserve cheapest covered parking spot under $80 for next month
Task 5: Flag largest late fee (or largest charge) for review
Task 6: Update communication preferences (payments email-only, maintenance SMS-only, no marketing)
Task 7: Add new roommate occupant starting next month
Task 8: Accept lowest 12-month renewal offer under $1,600
Task 9: Book first available 1-hour gym slot tomorrow after 6 PM (or earliest available)
